message:
🌱 Add offline detection card to dashboard catalog (#115)

* 🌱 Add offline detection card to dashboard templates and catalog

- Add to Klaude AI Dashboard template
- Add to AddCardModal card catalog for manual addition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Improve offline node detection to catch any non-Ready status

- Detect nodes with status !== 'Ready' (catches SchedulingDisabled, NotReady, Unknown, etc.)
- Also detect nodes with unschedulable: true

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
